headline: Prediction: Delta Air Lines Stock Will Prove Wall Street Right and Hit $100 by 2028
summary: The airline is being stress-tested in very difficult conditions and is demonstrating resilience.

headline: American Airlines CEO plan to close profit gap with Delta, United
summary: CEO Robert Isom outlined plans for a 37,000-square-foot lounge and a new wide-body aircraft order as American trails Delta and United by billions in annual profit
